data.title: SRx Health Updates Shareholders on EMJX Merger Progress
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from SRx Health Solutions ( (SRXH) ) is now available.

On April 17, 2026, SRx Health Solutions and EMJ Crypto Technologies released a shareholder letter detailing operational progress and the status of their proposed merger, which was first announced in December 2025. EMJX highlighted strong early performance from its second-generation digital-asset treasury hedging strategy, including a 5.69% return in March 2026 versus a 4.98% decline in the S&P 500 and additional gains through mid-April, underscoring its claim of institutional-grade, risk-managed digital treasury capabilities.

The update framed EMJX as a treasury operating system rather than a traditional fund, contrasting its rules-based, multi-asset, hedged approach with earlier single-asset digital treasury models that exposed shareholders to greater volatility and dilution. Management disclosed that SRx had recently expanded treasury deployment into listed equities such as Compass Inc. and Opendoor Technologies Inc., and confirmed that a Form S-4 registration statement for the merger had been filed with the SEC, signaling regulatory review is underway and reinforcing management’s confidence that the transaction, once completed, will underpin long-term value creation for shareholders as EMJX becomes a wholly owned subsidiary.

Spark’s Take on SRXH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRXH is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses, cash burn, and high leverage). Corporate events are mixed—added funding and preferred redemption help, but the NYSE compliance warning is a material risk—while technicals show only modest near-term improvement and valuation remains unattractive due to ongoing losses and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on SRXH stock, click here.

More about SRx Health Solutions

SRx Health Solutions, Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the ticker SRXH, is pursuing a strategic shift through a definitive merger agreement with EMJ Crypto Technologies, a digital-asset treasury operating platform. EMJX positions itself as a second-generation, institutional-grade system for multi-asset digital treasury management, emphasizing quantitative models, artificial intelligence and systematic risk controls for corporate and investment treasuries.

The combined entity is targeting the growing market for disciplined digital-asset treasury solutions, differentiating itself from earlier, single-asset, price-appreciation-focused models that lacked robust risk management. By operating EMJX as a wholly owned subsidiary post-merger and appointing EMJX founder Eric M. Jackson as an officer of the subsidiary, SRx aims to embed this Gen2 treasury framework at the core of its capital allocation and growth strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 29,160,809

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $35.78M

For a thorough assessment of SRXH stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Aurora Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:ARR) ) has issued an update.

Aurora UK Alpha PLC has repurchased 24,022 ordinary shares of 25p each at a price of 240.7848 pence per share under its existing authority. data.title: Ithaca Energy grants long-term performance share awards to top executives
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Ithaca Energy PLC ( (GB:ITH) ).

Ithaca Energy has granted long-term performance share awards to its top executives under the company’s Long Term Incentive Plan, aligning their potential future equity rewards with shareholder returns. Executive chairman Yaniv Friedman, CEO Luciano Vasques and CFO Iain Lewis received nil-cost options over 469,804, 563,764 and 469,804 ordinary shares respectively, which will vest in 2029 subject to the company’s total shareholder return outperforming a peer group in the energy sector over a three-year period.

The awards, executed outside a trading venue on 15 April 2026, are structured to strengthen alignment between management and investors by tying executive compensation to relative market performance. The disclosure, made under UK market abuse rules, underscores Ithaca’s adherence to regulatory requirements and highlights the company’s use of incentive-based pay to retain and motivate senior leadership in a competitive energy industry landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ITH) stock is a Sell with a £2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ithaca Energy PLC stock, see the GB:ITH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ITH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ITH is a Outperform.

The score is driven by strong technical momentum and solid cash-flow performance, partially offset by elevated earnings volatility (net loss in 2025) and a less reliable valuation signal due to the negative P/E despite the high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ITH stock, click here.

More about Ithaca Energy PLC

Ithaca Energy plc is a UK-based energy company operating in the oil and gas sector. The company focuses on exploration and production activities, with its ordinary shares listed under ISIN GB00BPJHV584, and is subject to EU-derived market abuse and disclosure regulations in the UK.

data.title: Odfjell Drilling Wins Key Appeal in Norwegian Tax Dispute
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Odfjell Drilling Ltd. ( (DE:OD3) ).

Odfjell Drilling Ltd. reported that the Gulating Court of Appeal has issued a verdict in favour of its subsidiary Odfjell Offshore Ltd. in a dispute stemming from an adverse administrative tax ruling by the Norwegian Tax Authorities from December 2022. The decision, which may still be appealed by the tax authority within a month, removes a significant legal overhang for the group and could positively affect its financial position and regulatory standing if the ruling is upheld, although final resolution will depend on whether a further appeal is allowed.

The case underscores the importance of tax and regulatory outcomes for capital-intensive offshore drilling operators that are active in Norway’s heavily scrutinised petroleum sector. Investors and other stakeholders will be watching the next steps from the Norwegian Tax Authority, as any appeal and subsequent decision could influence the company’s future tax obligations and clarify the broader tax framework affecting similar companies in the region.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:OD3) stock is a Hold with a NOK110.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Odfjell Drilling Ltd. stock, see the DE:OD3 Stock Forecast page.

More about Odfjell Drilling Ltd.

Odfjell Drilling Ltd. is an offshore drilling and well services company focused on providing drilling operations, engineering and related services to the global oil and gas industry. The group operates primarily on the Norwegian Continental Shelf and other international offshore markets, serving energy companies that require high-specification rigs and technical expertise for exploration and production activities.

Average Trading Volume: 401,899

Current Market Cap: NOK24.6B

data.title: Sol Strategies Closes Darklake Labs Acquisition to Bolster Solana Privacy Tech
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sol Strategies ( (TSE:HODL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, Sol Strategies Inc. closed its acquisition of the assets of Darklake Labs Pte. Ltd., the developer of Zyga, a zero-knowledge proof system designed natively for the Solana blockchain to enable private transaction execution and mitigate front‑running and sandwich attacks. The transaction, valued at USD $1.2 million and paid through a mix of cash and 1,047,156 common shares subject to a four‑month lock‑up, also brings Darklake’s founders and core team into Sol Strategies, strengthening the company’s in‑house technology capabilities and deepening its positioning as a key player in the Solana ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HODL) stock is a Buy with a C$29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sol Strategies stock, see the TSE:HODL Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HODL is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by sharply weakened financial performance (large losses and negative cash flow) and a technically bearish price trend. The earnings call provides partial support via improving operating traction (STKESOL adoption, staking income growth, institutional validation), but liquidity/leverage and dilution risks remain significant, and valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on HODL stock, click here.

More about Sol Strategies

Sol Strategies Inc. is a Canadian investment company focused on the Solana blockchain ecosystem, with shares listed on the CSE under HODL and NASDAQ under STKE. The firm provides strategic investments and infrastructure solutions aimed at supporting the next generation of decentralized applications built on Solana and advancing blockchain innovation in that network’s broader economy.

data.title: TCS Launches Independent Probe and Oversight Panel Over Nashik Matter
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Tata Consultancy Services Limited ( (IN:TCS) ).

Tata Consultancy Services said its CEO and managing director, K. Krithivasan, has outlined steps the company is taking in response to a recent matter involving its Nashik unit. The company emphasized that the Nashik facility remains operational and that a staff member named in media reports did not hold any HR or leadership role.

TCS has appointed Deloitte and law firm Trilegal as independent advisors to an internal investigation led by President and COO Aarthi Subramanian. An oversight committee chaired by independent director Keki Mistry will review the findings, as TCS reiterates its zero-tolerance stance on misconduct and its cooperation with law enforcement to ensure a thorough and transparent resolution.

More about Tata Consultancy Services Limited

Tata Consultancy Services Limited is a global IT services, consulting and business solutions company headquartered in Mumbai. The firm provides software development, digital transformation, and outsourcing services to clients across industries worldwide, operating large delivery centers in India and key international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 289,511

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 9242B INR

data.title: ICRA Assigns and Reaffirms Strong Credit Ratings for Adani Power’s Rs 69,000 Crore Facilities
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Adani Power Limited ( (IN:ADANIPOWER) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Adani Power Limited has received credit rating actions from ICRA Limited, which assigned ICRA AA/Stable and ICRA A1+ ratings to its additional term loan and non-fund-based bank guarantee facilities. The agency also reaffirmed the same ratings for the company’s existing bank facilities and issued and proposed non-convertible debentures, covering total rated facilities of Rs 69,000 crore.

These strong and reaffirmed ratings underscore lenders’ confidence in Adani Power’s credit profile and capacity to service its large debt portfolio. The move supports the company’s financial flexibility in raising and refinancing capital for its power projects, which is significant for stakeholders given its sizable role in India’s electricity generation landscape.

More about Adani Power Limited

Adani Power Limited is an Indian power generation company based in Gujarat, operating thermal power plants and supplying electricity to utilities and industrial consumers. It focuses on large-scale power generation and related infrastructure, positioning itself as a key private player in India’s energy sector.
